replies.msg: My friend Ken who was born in 1993 is a Gemini while his girlfriend is an Aquarius. He'll be giving a birthday party tomorrow but alas I can't attend as I got work to do. When he invited me at first I said "I'll have to see" He's making the most elaborate preparations for the party. My cousin asked "how are the party preparations going?" Peter is assisting with the party preparations. Paul is assisting in making preparations for the party too. They're sharing the preparation between them so that it isn't too much work. Happy birthday ken. I'm sure your friends will join me in wishing you a very happy birthday. Last year he got a massage chair for not birthday. I remember I said "I can't believe you got me a massage chair" It didn't come cheap. Amy has received a commission for an article on picasso from an art magazine. She's doing research in preparation for the article. Her boyfriend too is assisting in the preparation of the research. His favourite team Raptors will be playing against Grizzlies next month. Matches like this require proper preparation. The poster and promo videos are in preparation. The players in Raptors are doing thorough preparation as they didn't perform well in their last game because they did very little preparation. Rockets didn't seem to have done much preparation for their last two games as well. They almost lost them so this time they're doing meticulous preparation for it including stealing, free throw shooting, three point shooting and dunking as well as cardio training. Training five hours a day is good preparation for a match like this. You cannot play against a high level team without adequate preparation. My friend Jason is making preparations for his ski trip to osaka. He's also making preparations to meet his favourite band X japan in Miyazaki. So he's preoccupied with these preparations. Preparations for next week's ski festival in osaka is being made. The organizations and institutions who organize it have announced that preparations for it are well under way.

replies.msg:
外電報道，34歲芬蘭新任女總理馬林(Sanna Marin)建議實施彈性工作制，每周工作4天及每天工作6小時，讓芬蘭人民有更多時間陪伴家人，並培養愛好、享受生活的其他方面。

馬林強調，讓芬蘭公民減少工作量很重要，是向選民提供幫助和信守承諾。提議出台後，立即受到芬蘭左翼聯盟領袖、教育部長Li Andersson支持。

芬蘭目前實行常規工作制，即每周工作5天，每天工作8小時。而在鄰國瑞典，自2015年以來已開始實施每天6小時工作制，結果顯示，員工更快樂，工作效率更高。

日本微軟公司去年也推行新工作制度試驗，將每周休息日增至3天，結果生產率驚人地上升39.9％。

馬林生於1985年11月，2019年12月就職，是芬蘭最年輕總理、第三名女總理，同時也是全世界最年輕的政府領導人之一。
